context: Tests whether the Core Motion skill corrects pedometer/activity/altimeter permission, authorization, activity-confidence, and altitude misconceptions without drifting into sibling skills.

checklist.name: Motion privacy key
checklist.description: Requires NSMotionUsageDescription for Core Motion APIs in the plan, not only for activity recognition.

checklist.name: Authorization checks
checklist.description: Checks authorization status through relevant pedometer, activity, or altimeter manager APIs before relying on data.

checklist.name: Activity flags
checklist.description: Explains that CMMotionActivity flags are not mutually exclusive and should be interpreted with confidence.

checklist.name: Absolute altitude semantics
checklist.description: Describes absolute altitude as altitude relative to sea level, not GPS-based altitude.

checklist.name: Absolute altitude hardware
checklist.description: Mentions that absolute altitude requires supported hardware such as iPhone 12 or later or Apple Watch Series 6/SE or later.

checklist.name: Sibling boundary
checklist.description: Keeps the answer in Core Motion scope rather than turning it into a HealthKit workout or SensorKit research guide.
